REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS TO ADDRESS SPECIFIC ISSUES AS TO EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO. PLAINTIFF'S OVERSIZED OPPOSITION FAILS TO SUGGEST ANY POSSIBILITY OF FURTHER AMENDMENT. PAGES 16-19 OF PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION ARE STRICKEN. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: JOANNA BROADWELL CSR #10959 (415-274-9977) OF VERITEXT LEGAL SOLUTIONS. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION, WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, IF IN GOOD FAITH PLAINTIFF CAN ALLEGE AND/OR ADDRESS THE FOLLOWING ISSUES: *PLAINTIFF'S ABILITY TO SUE AS A TRUST; *DEFENDANT'S IMMUNITY UNDER THE COMMUNICATIONS DECENCY ACT; *1ST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE WITH A CONTRACT: 2-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATION; *2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD: 3-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATION; FACTS ALLEGING RELIANCE AND CAUSATION; *3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UCL VIOLATIONS: FRAUDULENT, UNLAWFUL, OR UNFAIR CONDUCT UNDER THE UCL; *4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF: EXISTENCE OF A CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PARTIES; *5TH CAUSE OF ACTION INJUNCTIVE RELIEF: EXISTENCE OF ON-GOING CONDUCT; *6TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ACCOUNTING: EXISTENCE OF A RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE PARTIES; *7TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR EQUITABLE INDEMNITY: LOSS DUE TO LIABILITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ray K. Shahani, esq. (650-348-1444) for Plaintiff/opposing party 11th & Kissling Street Trust.
Michele D. Floyd, esq VIA Court Call (415-549-0580) and Adrianna Rubino, esq. (415-689-5491 of Sacks Ricketts & Case LLP for Defendant/Moving party AIRBNB, INC.
Court reporter: Joanna Broadwell CSR #10959 (415-274-9977) of Veritext Legal Solutions.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Demurrer has been previously sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts to address specific issues as to each cause of action. Plaintiff failed to do so. Plaintiff's oversized opposition fails to suggest any possibility of further amendment. Pages 16-19 of Plaintiff's opposition are stricken. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Joanna Broadwell CSR #10959 (415-274-9977) of Veritext Legal Solutions. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to December 20, 2017 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Continued To Oct-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Continued To Jul-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED as to all causes of action, with leave to amend, if in good faith Plaintiff can allege and/or address the following issues:
*Plaintiff's ability to sue as a trust;
*Defendant's immunity under the Communications Decency Act;
*1st cause of action for intentional interference with a contract: 2-year statute of limitation;
*2nd cause of action for fraud: 3-year statute of limitation; facts alleging reliance and causation;
*3rd cause of action for UCL violations: fraudulent, unlawful, or unfair conduct under the UCL;
*4th cause of action for declaratory relief: existence of a contract between the parties;
*5th cause of action injunctive relief: existence of on-going conduct;
*6th cause of action for accounting: existence of a relationship between the parties;
*7th cause of action for equitable indemnity: loss due to liability. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - The demurrer will be heard in Department 501, at 9:30 a.m., on May 4, 2017. That department handles all landlord-tenant related matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in that department. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =(302/HK)
